cards.title: Why Is My Teen Acting Like a Jerk?
cards.body: The "adolescent personality dip" explains why teenagers sometimes seem to lose their manners and become difficult. Understanding this developmental phase can help parents respond with patience rather than frustration.

cards.title: Hope and Care for the Special Needs Family
cards.body: Having a neurodiverse or physically disabled family member is one of the greatest stressors for nuclear families. Support systems and understanding can help families navigate these unique challenges.

cards.title: Families Call for Stronger Allergy Protections in Schools
cards.body: After a boy died from a severe allergic reaction at school, his mother is pushing for new legislation to protect pupils in Northern Ireland schools. Stronger allergy protections could save children's lives.

cards.title: Family Estrangement Effects on Wellbeing Are Mixed
cards.body: Estrangement exists on a continuum rather than being simply binary, with varying levels of contact and relationship. Support plays an important role whether families seek reconciliation or maintain distance.

cards.title: Britain Must Afford to Raise Children
cards.body: The government is spending billions to help families with childcare costs. However, profiteers are preventing families from receiving the full benefit of these support schemes.
